# Cache Attributes

**API Collection**

Attributes specifying texture cache behavior, used with the [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVMetalTextureCacheCreate(_:_:_:_:_:)] function.

## Constants

- **kCVMetalTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey**: The length of time, in seconds, before the cache is automatically evicted.
- **kCVMetalTextureUsage**: The set of options that define how you can use a texture on the GPU.
